pages.text: The $(item)Large Meadow Skyseed$() — dirt and flowers. A vast bloom — the best start for $(item)bees$().
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A vast wildflower meadow — every flower variant on a larger canvas, dotted with oak and cherry trees.
$(bold)More bees$()$(br)With more flowers come more $(item)bee nests$() — the best Skyseed for starting an apiary. A full complement of farm animals grazes here too.
